_backup.note: Dispatcher for post-conversation analysis. Called by Message Handler's Run Post-Conv (Execute Workflow). Parses client_id from FriendlyName, fetches transcript, fans out per-client via ANALYSIS_ROUTING (all empty in V1 → clean skip). Consumer contract: HANDOVER-postpro-brain-2026-06-30.md.

redacted_placeholders.__TWILIO_BASIC_AUTH__: Twilio Basic auth header: base64(API_KEY_SID:API_KEY_SECRET) — Fetch Conversation + Fetch Transcript nodes
redacted_placeholders.__CREDENTIAL_ID__: GlobalChatbot httpHeaderAuth credential id (Send to Analysis Webhook node)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ conversation_sid: $json.conversation_sid, client_id: $json.client_id, reason: $json.reason, state_from: $json.state_from, locale: $json.locale, started_at: $json.started_at, ended_at: $json.ended_at, message_count: $json.message_count, transcript: $json.transcript }) }}
